summary.boundary: Audit only; no CFD pressure values are inferred or created.

rows.boundary: Transfer bundle is input only; it is not pressure evidence.
Import records are provenance only; pressure values require parser and gate checks.
A missing latest archive does not invalidate current empty evidence, but it should not be cited.
OpenFOAM result parser only; empty output means no returned solver results were found.
Pressure-drop rows require returned pInlet/pOutlet values and passing logs.

rows.warning: author review still required before manuscript insertion
rows.boundary: No pressure values are inferred; valid cases require pressure output, aligned inlet/outlet sampling times and passing checkMesh/simpleFoam logs.
